name: learn-fatiha-academy-website-
description: ``` ├── index.html                  # Beautiful Quran animation landing page ├── bg image/                   # Background image for landing page ├── fonts/                      # Custom Arabic fonts │   └── TEHAFS2TharwatEmara.ttf └── With GPT/                   # Main website files     ├── index.html              # Main homepage     ├── about.html              # About page     ├── courses.html            # Courses page     ├── enroll.html             # Enrollment form     ├── contact.html            # Contact page     ├── faq.html                # FAQ page     ├── privacy-policy.html     # Privacy policy     ├── terms-of-service.html   # Terms of service     ├── thank-you.html          # Thank you page     └── assets/                 # CSS, JS, and images         ├── css/         │   └── style.css         └── js/             ├── site.js         # Main site navigation             ├── home.js         # Falling letters animation             └── forms.js        # Form handling ```
